ruleBookInfo.author: author
ruleBookInfo.init:
var J = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result); var o = selector => String(J.select(selector).text()); var book = { name: o('h1').replace(/\s.*/,''), author: o('.ml1 ul li:eq(2)').replace(/.*：/,''), kind: o('.ml1 ul li:eq(0)').replace(/.*：/,'').replace(/\s-\s/,','), wordCount: o('.ml1 ul li:eq(1)').replace(/.*：/,''), latest: o('.ml1 ul li:eq(4)'), intro: '
' + J.select('.center p').html(), cover: J.select('.ml1 img').attr('src'), url: J.select('.ml1 dl a:eq(0)').attr('href') +',{charset:"gbk"}', }; book;
ruleBookInfo.name: name
